description_long: This is a round, shallow ceramic plate filled with a generous serving of rice and what appears to be a saucy, spiced dish, possibly biryani or a similar rice-based meal. The plate is white with a subtle green rim and is set atop a marbled brown surface, suggesting a countertop or tabletop. The rice is fluffy and white, with visible chunks of vegetables or meat and a drizzle of sauce, giving the dish a rich, appetizing appearance. The food is piled high, forming a mound in the center of the plate, and garnished with herbs or spices. The plate itself is smooth and glossy, with no visible handles or decorative patterns beyond the rim. The overall presentation is clean and inviting, suitable for serving in a casual dining or street food context.
description: A white ceramic plate with a green rim, filled with a mound of saucy rice and garnished with herbs, set on a marbled brown surface.
description_view_0: The plate is viewed from a slight angle, showing the full mound of rice and sauce with visible garnish and a clear view of the marbled surface beneath.
description_view_1: This view is more head-on, emphasizing the height of the rice mound and the even distribution of sauce and toppings.
description_view_2: The plate is seen from the opposite side, highlighting the rounded shape and the dense, central pile of rice with sauce drizzled over the top.
description_view_3: A side view that shows the edge of the plate and the layered texture of the rice, with some garnish visible on top.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is placed on a marbled brown surface, likely a table or countertop.
